mapper.select: SELECT user_id, balance, freeze_balance, version, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM biz_user_wallet WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_user_wallet SET balance = balance - #{amount}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND version = #{version} AND balance >= #{amount} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE biz_user_wallet SET balance = balance + #{amount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE biz_user_wallet SET balance = balance - #{amount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND balance >= #{amount} AND is_deleted = 0
